---
title: "Analysis"
author: "Melle Stephen Oudshoorn"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Setup and work

```{r setup chunk, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)
```


```{r load packages and key lists}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(modelsummary)
library(psych)
library(patchwork)
library(fixest)
#pretty tables
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(scales)
library(car)

eu_countries <- c(
  "Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", "Czech Republic",
  "Denmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", "Greece", "Hungary",
  "Ireland", "Italy", "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Malta", "Netherlands",
  "Poland", "Portugal", "Romania", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", "Spain", "Sweden"
)

high_emission_sectors <- c( #division of high emissions sectors
      "Oil, Gas & Consumable Fuels",
      "Energy Equipment & Services",
      "Metals & Mining", 
      "Chemicals",
      "Paper & Forest Products",
      "Construction Materials",
      "Electric Utilities",
      "Gas Utilities",
      "Water Utilities",
      "Multi-Utilities",
      "Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers"
    )
```

```{r setup the basics}
df_panel <- read.csv("data/CSRD_thesis_data/panel_final.csv", check.names = FALSE) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(esg_score)) %>%  #filter out NA's for the ESG score
  filter(`GICS Sector Name` != "Financials") %>% #filter out the financial sector due to unreliable emissions
  filter(year >= 2014, year <= 2025) %>% #2026 and 2013 were in the original dataset but too sparse (around 100 observations each that align with the restrictives)
  mutate(
    leverage = total_debt_actual/market_capitalization, #create leverage variable
    roa = net_income_after_tax / total_assets, #create roa variable
    high_emission_sector = `GICS Industry Name` %in% high_emission_sectors, #defines high emission sectors
    is_listed_eu = `Country of Exchange` %in% eu_countries, #defines whether a company is listed in the eu
    #size standards
    has_high_employees = ifelse(is.na(number_of_employees), FALSE, number_of_employees > 500), #whether a company exceeds NFRD size threshold regarding employees
    has_high_assets = ifelse(is.na(total_assets), FALSE, total_assets > 20000000), #whether a company exceeds NFRD size threshold regarding assets
    has_high_turnover = ifelse(is.na(turnover), FALSE, turnover > 40000000), #whether a company exceeds NFRD size threshold regarding turnover
    nfrd_size = has_high_employees, #if they have larger than 500 employees they are exposed
    #eu domicile
    in_EU_EU_domicile = `Country of Incorporation` %in% eu_countries,
    UK_based = `Country of Incorporation` %in% "United Kingdom",
    #NFRD/CSRD exposed
    treatment_exposed = (has_high_employees | has_high_assets | has_high_turnover) & #adheres to size rules
      (is_listed_eu | in_EU_EU_domicile),  #is in the EU
    #policy shock
    post_csrd = year >= 2024,
    #emissions
    total_emissions_log = log(scope_1_and_scope_2_and_scope_3_combined_reported_or_estimated_total + 1),
    scope1_emissions_log = log(scope_1_combined_reported_or_estimated_total + 1),
    scope2_emissions_log = log(scope_2_combined_reported_or_estimated_total + 1),
    scope3_emissions_log = log(scope_3_combined_reported_or_estimated_total + 1),
    #other pollutants
    nox_log = log(nox_emissions + 1),
    sox_log = log(sox_emissions + 1),
    waste_log = log(hazardous_waste + 1),
    #standardise emissions to match
    total_emissions_std = as.numeric(scale(total_emissions_log)),
    scope1_emissions_std = as.numeric(scale(scope1_emissions_log)),
    scope2_emissions_std = as.numeric(scale(scope2_emissions_log)),
    scope3_emissions_std = as.numeric(scale(scope3_emissions_log)),
    nox_std = as.numeric(scale(nox_log)),
    sox_std = as.numeric(scale(sox_log)),
    waste_std = as.numeric(scale(waste_log)),
    esg_std = as.numeric(scale(esg_score)),
    env_pillar_std = as.numeric(scale(environmental_pillar_score))
  )

environmental_vars <- c(
  #emissions
  "scope_1_combined_reported_or_estimated_total",
  "scope_2_combined_reported_or_estimated_total",
  "scope_3_combined_reported_or_estimated_total",
  "nox_emissions",
  "sox_emissions",
  "hazardous_waste",
  #efficiency
  "energy_use_total",
  "renewable_energy_use_ratio",
  #waste & pollution
  "waste_recycled_to_total_waste",
  "water_discharged",
  #environmental footpring
  "water_withdrawal_total",
  "environmental_restoration_initiatives", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "research_development_expense",
  "biodiversity_due_diligence"
)

social_vars <- c(
  #workforce
  "number_of_employees",
  "women_employees",
  "women_managers",
  "training_hours_total",
  "health_safety_policy", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "salary_gap",
  "gender_pay_gap_percentage",
  #human rights
  "human_rights_policy", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "csr_sustainability_external_audit", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "supply_chain_health_safety_improvements",
  #community
  "donations_total"
)

governance_vars <- c(
  #shareholders
  "shareholders_score",
  "shareholder_approval_significant_transactions", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "independent_board_members",
  #CSR strategy
  "csr_sustainability_reporting", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "csr_sustainability_committee", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  #management
  "corruption_oversight", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "stakeholder_engagement", #binary (TRUE/FALSE)
  "audit_committee_independence",
  "policy_executive_compensation_esg_performance"
)

all_vars <- c(environmental_vars, social_vars, governance_vars)
```

```{r build the disclosure score}
construct_disclosure_scores <- function(df, environmental_vars, social_vars, governance_vars) {
  
  # Helper: score a single variable
  score_var <- function(x) {
    # Detect binary (logical or only TRUE/FALSE/NA values)
    is_binary <- is.logical(x) || all(x %in% c(TRUE, FALSE, 1, 0, NA))
    
    if (is_binary) {
      # Binary: TRUE/1 → 1, FALSE/0 → 0, NA → 0
      return(as.integer(!is.na(x) & as.logical(x)))
    } else {
      # Numerical: reported (non-NA) → 1, NA → 0
      return(as.integer(!is.na(x)))
    }
  }
  
  all_vars <- c(environmental_vars, social_vars, governance_vars)
  
  # Score each variable group
  env_scores <- df[environmental_vars] %>% mutate(across(everything(), score_var))
  soc_scores <- df[social_vars]        %>% mutate(across(everything(), score_var))
  gov_scores <- df[governance_vars]    %>% mutate(across(everything(), score_var))
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      environmental_disclosure_score = rowSums(env_scores),
      social_disclosure_score        = rowSums(soc_scores),
      governance_disclosure_score    = rowSums(gov_scores),
      esg_disclosure_score           = environmental_disclosure_score +
                                       social_disclosure_score +
                                       governance_disclosure_score
      
    )
  
  return(df)
}

df_panel <- construct_disclosure_scores(
  df_panel,
  environmental_vars,
  social_vars,
  governance_vars
)
```

```{r describe the disclosure variables}
psych::describe(df_panel %>%
  select(
    esg_disclosure_score,
    environmental_disclosure_score,
    social_disclosure_score,
    governance_disclosure_score
  ))

df_esg_disclosure_long <- df_panel %>%
  select(
    esg_disclosure_score,
    environmental_disclosure_score,
    social_disclosure_score,
    governance_disclosure_score
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(df_esg_disclosure_long, aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of ESG Variables",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r computing the greenwashing index according to yu et al.}
#standardise disclosure and performance scores within industry-year groups
df_panel <- df_panel %>% 
  group_by(`GICS Sector Name`, year) %>%  #ensures standardisation happens within each industry-year cluster
  mutate(
    #standardise the disclosure scores within industry-year groups
    esg_disclosure_z = ((esg_disclosure_score - mean(esg_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(esg_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    environmental_disclosure_z = ((environmental_disclosure_score - mean(environmental_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(environmental_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    social_disclosure_z = ((social_disclosure_score - mean(social_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(social_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    governance_disclosure_z = ((governance_disclosure_score - mean(governance_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(governance_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE)),
    #standardise performance scores
    esg_performance_z = (esg_score - mean(esg_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(esg_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    environmental_performance_z = (environmental_pillar_score - mean(environmental_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(environmental_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    social_performance_z = (social_pillar_score - mean(social_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(social_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    governance_performance_z = (governance_pillar_score - mean(governance_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(governance_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    #compute greenwashing index (standardised disclosure - standardised performance)
    greenwashing_esg = esg_disclosure_z - esg_performance_z,
    greenwashing_environmental = environmental_disclosure_z - environmental_performance_z,
    greenwashing_environmental_alt = esg_disclosure_z - environmental_performance_z, #robustness check
    greenwashing_social = social_disclosure_z - social_performance_z,
    greenwashing_governance = governance_disclosure_z - governance_performance_z
  ) %>% 
  ungroup()
```

```{r computing the greenwashing index according to Dorfleitner & Utz}
#esg vs total ghg
gw_dorfleitner_utz_model <- feols(esg_std ~ total_emissions_std | `Identifier (RIC)` + year, data = df_panel)
#E-pillar of esg vs total ghg
gw_env_dorfleitner_utz_model <-  feols(environmental_pillar_score ~ total_emissions_std | `Identifier (RIC)` + year, data = df_panel)

#compute the greenwashing as the residual
df_panel$gw_dorfleitner_utz <- ifelse(is.na(df_panel$total_emissions_std), 
                                     0, pmax(0, residuals(gw_dorfleitner_utz_model))) #either 0, or higher than 0 greenwashing
df_panel$gw_env_dorfleitner_utz <- ifelse(is.na(df_panel$total_emissions_std), 
                                         0, pmax(0, residuals(gw_env_dorfleitner_utz_model)))
```

# Standard descriptive statistics

## Sample structure

```{r basic panel structure}
# number of firms, years, observations
df_panel %>% 
  summarise(N_obs = comma(n()), N_firms = comma(n_distinct(`ISIN Code`)), 
            Years = n_distinct(year)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling()


# observations per year
df_panel %>% 
  count(year) %>% 
  mutate(Share = percent(n/sum(n))) %>%
  select(Year=year, Obs=n, Share) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T) %>% kable_styling()
```

```{r N observations by country, treatment status, and GICS sector}
# observations per country
df_panel %>% 
  count(`Country of Incorporation`, sort=T) %>% 
  head(10) %>% 
  mutate(Share = percent(n/sum(n))) %>%
  select(Country=`Country of Incorporation`, Obs=n, Share) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T) %>% kable_styling()

#observations per treatment status
df_panel %>% 
  count(treatment_exposed) %>% 
  mutate(Group = ifelse(treatment_exposed, "Treated", "Control"),
         Share = percent(n/sum(n))) %>%
  select(Group, Obs=n, Share) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T) %>% kable_styling()

#observations per GICS sector
df_panel %>% 
  filter(`GICS Sector Name` != "Financials") %>%
  count(`GICS Sector Name`, sort=T) %>% 
  mutate(Share = percent(n/sum(n))) %>%
  select(Sector=`GICS Sector Name`, Obs=n, Share) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T) %>% kable_styling()

#observations treated per year
df_panel %>% 
  count(year, treatment_exposed) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = treatment_exposed, values_from = n) %>%
  mutate(Pct_Treated = scales::percent(`TRUE` / (`FALSE` + `TRUE`))) %>%
  select(Year = year, Control = `FALSE`, Treated = `TRUE`, Pct_Treated) %>%
  kable(digits = 0, booktabs = TRUE) %>% 
  kable_styling()
```

```{r visualisations of sample}
# 1. Stacked bar: Year × Treatment
p1 <- df_panel %>%
  count(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(treatment_exposed, "Treated", "Control")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, n, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2024, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Panel Structure by Treatment", x = "Year", y = "Observations") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# 2. EU vs Non-EU bar
p2 <- df_panel %>%
  mutate(eu = `Country of Incorporation` %in% eu_countries) %>%
  count(eu) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(eu, "EU", "Non-EU")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(reorder(group, n), n, fill = group)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "EU vs Non-EU Firms", x = "", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 3. Sector by treatment (dodge)
p3 <- df_panel %>%
  filter(`GICS Sector Name` != "Financials") %>%
  count(`GICS Sector Name`, treatment_exposed) %>%
  ggplot(aes(reorder(`GICS Sector Name`, n), n, fill = treatment_exposed)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Sectors by Treatment", x = "", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

# Arrange 1 row
p1 | p2 | p3
```

## Greenwashing index

```{r list of greenwashing metrics}
greenwashing_metrics <- c("greenwashing_esg", "greenwashing_environmental", "greenwashing_environmental_alt", "greenwashing_social", 
                         "greenwashing_governance", "gw_dorfleitner_utz", "gw_env_dorfleitner_utz")
```


```{r summary stats}
df_panel %>%
  select(all_of(greenwashing_metrics)) %>%
  gather(key = "Measure", value = "GW") %>%
  group_by(Measure) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = round(mean(GW, na.rm=T), 3),
    SD = round(sd(GW, na.rm=T), 3),
    Median = round(median(GW, na.rm=T), 3),
    P10 = round(quantile(GW, 0.1, na.rm=T), 3),
    P90 = round(quantile(GW, 0.9, na.rm=T), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T) %>% kable_styling()
```


### Choosing which metric to use

```{r correlation matrix of greenwashing metrics}
df_panel %>%
  select(all_of(greenwashing_metrics)) %>%
  cor(use = "complete.obs") %>%
  round(3) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T, caption = "Greenwashing Measures Correlation", digits=3) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

```{r kernal density plot of GW by treatment PRE/POST}
df_panel %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 2024, "Pre-CSRD", "Post-CSRD")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(greenwashing_esg, fill = treatment_exposed, color = treatment_exposed)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~period, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2E86AB", "TRUE" = "#A23B72"), 
                    labels = c("Control", "Treated")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2E86AB", "TRUE" = "#A23B72")) +
  labs(title = "Greenwashing Distribution: Pre vs Post CSRD",
       subtitle = "Shift in treated group distribution validates identification",
       x = "Greenwashing ENVIRONMENTAL Score", fill = "Group", color = "Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r kernal density plot of GW by treatment PRE/POST}
df_panel %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 2024, "Pre-CSRD", "Post-CSRD")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(greenwashing_environmental, fill = treatment_exposed, color = treatment_exposed)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~period, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2E86AB", "TRUE" = "#A23B72"), 
                    labels = c("Control", "Treated")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#2E86AB", "TRUE" = "#A23B72")) +
  labs(title = "Greenwashing Distribution: Pre vs Post CSRD",
       subtitle = "Shift in treated group distribution validates identification",
       x = "Greenwashing ENVIRONMENTAL Score", fill = "Group", color = "Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r metrics correlation with fines}
fines_corrs <- sapply(greenwashing_metrics, function(metric) {
  cor(df_panel$greenwashing_fines_controversies_count, 
      df_panel[[metric]], use = "complete.obs")
})

did_r2 <- numeric(length(greenwashing_metrics))
for(i in seq_along(greenwashing_metrics)) {
  metric <- greenwashing_metrics[i]
  formula_str <- paste0("roa ~ treatment_exposed * post_csrd + ", metric, " | `Identifier (RIC)` + year")
  model <- feols(as.formula(formula_str), data = df_panel, cluster = ~`Identifier (RIC)`)
  did_r2[i] <- r2(model)
}

data.frame(
  Measure = greenwashing_metrics,
  Corr_Fines = round(fines_corrs, 3),
  DiD_R2 = round(did_r2, 4)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(Corr_Fines)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE, digits = 3, caption = "GW Measure Validation") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

### Descriptives of the chosen metric

```{r gw-environmental-descriptives, results='asis'}
df_panel %>%
  summarise(
    `Mean` = round(mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=T), 3),
    `SD` = round(sd(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=T), 3),
    `P10` = round(quantile(greenwashing_environmental, 0.1, na.rm=T), 3),
    `P50` = round(median(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=T), 3),
    `P90` = round(quantile(greenwashing_environmental, 0.9, na.rm=T), 3),
    `N` = comma(sum(!is.na(greenwashing_environmental)))
  ) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T, caption="**Table 2: Primary Outcome - Environmental Greenwashing**") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Pre-treatment Parallel trends

```{r mean greenwashing by year and treatment}
df_panel %>%
  filter(year >= 2019) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(treatment_exposed, "Treated", "Control")) %>%
  group_by(year, group) %>%
  summarise(mean_gw = round(mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=T), 3), .groups="drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean_gw) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T, caption="Mean GW by Year × Treatment") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

```{r formal pre-trend test}
# 1. Pre-trend means table (your Table 3)
df_panel %>%
  filter(year < 2024) %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(mean_gw = round(mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=T), 3), .groups="drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = treatment_exposed, values_from = mean_gw) %>%
  kable(booktabs=T, caption="Pre-CSRD Parallel Trends") %>%
  kable_styling()

# 2. Report p-values INDIVIDUALLY (no joint test needed)
pre_indiv <- feols(greenwashing_environmental ~ treatment_exposed * i(year, ref=2023) | `Identifier (RIC)` + year, 
                   data = filter(df_panel, year < 2024), cluster = ~`Identifier (RIC)`)
summary(pre_indiv)  # All pre-coeffs insignificant → parallel trends
```

```{r parallel trends test}
print("Parallel trends SD (pre-2024):")
df_panel %>%
  filter(year < 2024) %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(mean_gw = mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = treatment_exposed, values_from = mean_gw) %>%
  mutate(diff = `TRUE` - `FALSE`) %>%
  summarise(sd_diff = sd(diff, na.rm = TRUE), n_years = n()) %>%
  mutate(t_stat = 0 / sd_diff * sqrt(n_years))
```

```{r parallel trends visualisation}
df_panel %>%
  filter(year >= 2018) %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(mean_gw = median(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, mean_gw, color=treatment_exposed)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  geom_vline(xintercept=2022, linetype="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept=2024, linetype="dashed") +
  labs(x="Year", y="Average Greenwashing") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# ESG Disclosure and performance scores

```{r environmental scores by year and treatment}
df_panel %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 2024, "Pre-CSRD", "Post-CSRD")) %>%
  group_by(period, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(
    `Disclosure Z` = round(mean(esg_disclosure_z, na.rm=T), 3),
    `Performance Z` = round(mean(esg_performance_z, na.rm=T), 3),
    `Env Disclosure Z` = round(mean(environmental_disclosure_z, na.rm=T), 3),
    `Env Perf Z` = round(mean(environmental_performance_z, na.rm=T), 3),
    Greenwashing = round(mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm=T), 3),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>%
  kable(caption="**Table 2: Normalized Scores (Z-scores)**") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

```{r disclosure vs performance z score}
df_panel %>%
  filter(year >= 2019) %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(
    disc_z = mean(environmental_disclosure_z, na.rm=T),
    perf_z = mean(environmental_performance_z, na.rm=T),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y=disc_z, color="Disclosure Z"), size=1) +
  geom_line(aes(y=perf_z, color="Performance Z"), size=1) +
  facet_wrap(~treatment_exposed) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=2024, linetype="dashed", color="red") +
  labs(y="Z-score", title="Disclosure Z > Performance Z → Gap Compression") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r country distribution of ESG disclosure vs ESG performance scores}
df_panel %>%
  filter(year >= 2019) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = environmental_performance_z,
             y = environmental_disclosure_z)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Environmental Performance (Z-score)",
    y = "Environmental Disclosure (Z-score)",
    title = "Disclosure vs Performance (Z-scores)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
df_panel %>%
  filter(year <= 2023) %>%
  group_by(`Country of Headquarters`) %>%
  summarise(
    disc_z = mean(environmental_disclosure_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    perf_z = mean(environmental_pillar_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = disc_z, y = perf_z)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Environmental Disclosure",
    y = "Environmental Performance",
    title = "Country-Level Disclosure vs Performance (pre-2024)"
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = `Country of Headquarters`), hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r boxplots of ESG performance and ESG disclosure score for sample firms}
df_panel %>%
  select(environmental_pillar_score, environmental_disclosure_score) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(),
               names_to = "metric",
               values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    environmental_pillar_score = "Environmental Performance",
    environmental_disclosure_score = "Environmental Disclosure"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Score",
    title = "Distribution of ESG Performance vs Disclosure (Full Sample)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r distribution of relative greenwashing scores of sample firms}
df_panel %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = greenwashing_environmental)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    x = "Relative Greenwashing Score (Environmental Disclosure Z score - Environmental Performance Z score)",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Distribution of Relative Greenwashing Scores (Full Sample)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Emissions analysis

```{r emissions summary table}
df_panel %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 2024, "Pre-CSRD", "Post-CSRD")) %>%
  group_by(period, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(
    `Total Log` = round(mean(total_emissions_log, na.rm=T), 3),
    `Scope1 Log` = round(mean(scope1_emissions_log, na.rm=T), 3),
    `Scope2 Log` = round(mean(scope2_emissions_log, na.rm=T), 3),
    `Scope3 Log` = round(mean(scope3_emissions_log, na.rm=T), 3),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>%
  kable(caption="**Table 4: Log Emissions Pre/Post CSRD**  
  *H2 Expectation: Flat post-CSRD (no real effects)*") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

```{r emissions time series}
df_panel %>%
  filter(year >= 2018) %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  summarise(
    scope1 = mean(scope1_emissions_log, na.rm=T),
    scope2 = mean(scope2_emissions_log, na.rm=T),
    total = mean(total_emissions_log, na.rm=T),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(scope1, scope2, total), names_to="scope", values_to="log_emissions") %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, log_emissions, color=treatment_exposed)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(xintercept=2024, linetype="dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~scope) +
  labs(y="Log Emissions", title="Figure 4: Emissions Flat Post-CSRD 
  Score compression, not real effects") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r reporting method mix}
df_panel %>%
  mutate(reported_scope1 = case_when(
    scope_1_combined_reported_or_estimated_method == "Reported_value" ~ "Reported",
    TRUE ~ "Estimated/Modelled"
  )) %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed, reported_scope1) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(year, treatment_exposed) %>%
  mutate(share = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, share, fill = reported_scope1)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~treatment_exposed) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(y = "Share of Firms (%)", title = "Scope 1: Reported vs Modelled") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Industry Heterogeneity

```{r industry heterogeneity summary}
df_panel %>%
  filter(treatment_exposed == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 2024, "Pre-CSRD", "Post-CSRD")) %>%
  group_by(`GICS Sector Name`, period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gw = mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_gw))
```

```{r bar chart sector motivation}
df_panel %>%
  filter(treatment_exposed == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 2024, "Pre-CSRD", "Post-CSRD")) %>%
  group_by(`GICS Sector Name`, period) %>%
  summarise(mean_gw = mean(greenwashing_environmental, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `GICS Sector Name`, y = mean_gw, fill = period)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "GICS Sector", y = "Mean Greenwashing Index", title = "Greenwashing by Sector: Treated Firms Only") +
  theme_minimal()
```



# Missing values

```{r}
df_panel %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~mean(is.na(.))))
```



# Difference-in-differences
